name: Recover failed Stripe payments with AI dunning emails in Gmail

parameters.content:
## Recover failed Stripe payments with AI dunning emails in Gmail

## How it works

1. Triggers upon a failed Stripe payment event.
2. Normalizes invoice data for processing.
3. Uses AI to write a dunning email.
4. Sends the dunning email via Gmail.
5. Logs the email transaction to a Google Sheet.
6. Checks if this is the final attempt to send dunning emails and escalates to the owner if needed.

## Setup steps

- [ ] Configure Stripe account to connect with the Stripe Trigger node.
- [ ] Set up Gmail credentials for sending emails.
- [ ] Ensure Google Sheets access for logging purposes.
- [ ] Configure Slack credentials for message escalation.

## Customization

Modify the AI model configuration in the Write Dunning Email node to adjust the tone or language of the emails.

## Stripe trigger and normalization

Handles the notification of failed payments and prepares data for email crafting.

## Generate and send dunning email

Utilizes AI to draft a dunning email and sends it through Gmail.

## Log outcome and determine escalation

Logs email dispatch to Google Sheets and checks if escalation to the owner is needed.

## Slack escalation notification

Escalates the issue to the owner through Slack if needed.

parameters.text: =:rotating_light: Final dunning attempt failed — {{ $('Prepare Invoice Data').item.json.customer_name }} ({{ $('Prepare Invoice Data').item.json.customer_email }}) owes {{ $('Prepare Invoice Data').item.json.amount_due }} {{ $('Prepare Invoice Data').item.json.currency }}. Consider pausing service / manual outreach.
